body: Hive Mind issue https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/501 needs to add agent-commander as a dependency and rely on it for /task and /split flows. I checked package availability on 2026-04-26 and found two blockers: - npm package lookup fails for both agent-commander and @link-assistant/agent-commander with E404. - npm install github:link-assistant/agent-commander#v0.2.0 fails because the repository has no root package.json; the JavaScript package is under js/package.json. Observed install error: npm error enoent Could not read package.json: Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open .../git-clone.../package.json Could we either publish the JavaScript package to npm as documented in README.md, or expose a root package.json/workspace package setup that allows normal npm dependency installation from the GitHub repo/release? --- I published js package at https://www.npmjs.com/package/agent-commander, and configured it for js.yml Publishing via rust.yml should work as CARGO_TOKEN is set on organization level. Please, configure proper js.yml and rust.yml from templates we use on other repositories. Use all the best practices from CI/CD templates (check full file tree to compare for all GitHub workflow and CI/CD scripts file), if the same issue is found in template report issue also in templates: - https://github.com/link-foundation/js-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template - https://github.com/link-foundation/rust-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template We should compare all files, so we don't have more CI/CD errors in the future and reuse all the best practices from these templates. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context autocompacts and you can continue indefinetely, do as much as possible in one go, if something will be left over, we can continue in the same pull request, until it is fully done.
title: Publish JavaScript package or expose root package.json for npm dependency installs
